page.content: In Q1 2024, Lockheed Martin's Aircraft leasing portfolio exhibits a P/E Ratio of 15.8, a Current Ratio of 1.5, and Leverage Ratios with a Debt/Equity of 2.3, complemented by an Interest Coverage of 4.2. The Net Profit Margin stands at 12.5%, with a Return on Equity of 18.7% and an Operating Margin of 10.1%.

lines.text: In Q1 2024, Lockheed Martin's Aircraft leasing portfolio exhibits a P/E Ratio of 15.8, a Current Ratio of 1.5, and Leverage
Ratios with a Debt/Equity of 2.3, complemented by an Interest Coverage of 4.2. The Net Profit Margin stands at 12.5%, with a
Return on Equity of 18.7% and an Operating Margin of 10.1%.

page.content: The Total Debt is recorded at INR500M, against an Equity Value that underscores the financial robustness.

lines.text: The Total Debt is recorded at INR500M, against an Equity Value that underscores the financial robustness.

page.content: The supply chain analysis reveals critical components and their associated metrics: for Aluminum, the Average Lead Time is 30 days, with a Total Cost of INR5,000,000, a Year-over-Year Change of 5%, and a Market Share of 15%; Copper shows a Lead Time of 45 days, costing INR3,000,000, with a 3% YoY Change and 12% Market Share; Steel has an Average Lead Time of 50 days and a Total Cost of INR7,000,000, with a 6% YoY Change and 18% Market Share; Composite Materials have a Lead Time of 25 days and cost INR2,000,000, with a 2% YoY Change and 10% Market Share; Electronics reflect a 60-day Lead Time, costing INR10,000,000, with a 4% YoY Change and 20% Market Share; Engines have a Lead Time of 75 days, costing INR15,000,000, with an 8% YoY Change. The Overall Average Lead Time is 50 days with a Total Cost of INR35,000,000, a 5% YoY Change, and a 15% Market Share.
